blended.narrative: Jay Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light freezing rain, highs of 40°F.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
